activation_blockers: Reviewed public batch Schnorr baseline unavailable.
Bitcoin Core validation-path integration not implemented.
Final BIP-360/QRS transaction digest definitions not available.
Second reviewed SLH-DSA implementation not wired.

batch_sensitivity.policy: Hypothetical batch speedups are sensitivity analysis only; they are not a measured baseline and no fake batch baseline is synthesized.

checks.detail: No batch Schnorr timing is synthesized from assumed speedups.
checks.name: Batch evidence forbids fake speedups
QRS worst p99 below individual Schnorr p99
QRS worst p99 below experimental batch Schnorr p99
Experimental batch tightens individual Schnorr baseline

conclusion: Current native evidence supports continuing with the no-additional-budget rule as Draft-stage review material.

fallback_triggers.policy: Fallback trigger checks identify when the inactive explicit QRS budget must be reconsidered before activation.

triggers.detail: fallback trigger if QRS worst-invalid p99 exceeds individual Schnorr p99
triggers.name: qrs_worst_exceeds_individual_schnorr

triggers.detail: fallback trigger if QRS worst-invalid p99 exceeds a 2.5x hypothetical reviewed-batch-Schnorr baseline
triggers.name: qrs_worst_exceeds_2_5x_hypothetical_reviewed_batch_schnorr

triggers.detail: fallback trigger if QRS worst-invalid p99 exceeds a 3.0x hypothetical reviewed-batch-Schnorr baseline
triggers.name: qrs_worst_exceeds_3_0x_hypothetical_reviewed_batch_schnorr

triggers.detail: fallback trigger if a reviewed public batch-Schnorr implementation becomes available and QRS exceeds it
triggers.name: qrs_worst_exceeds_reviewed_public_batch_schnorr

triggers.detail: fallback trigger requires Bitcoin Core validation-path integration evidence; current harness models that path only
triggers.name: bitcoin_core_validation_path_overhead
